metadata.name: Disguise: cast Lumbering Laundry face-down and turn face up
metadata.description: p1 casts Lumbering Laundry face-down using Disguise for {3}, placing a 2/2 colorless nameless creature with ward {2} on the battlefield. p1 then pays the Disguise cost {5} to turn it face up, revealing Lumbering Laundry as a 4/5 Artifact Creature — Golem. Tests CR 702.162 (Disguise: Morph rules apply + ward {2} while face-down), CR 702.37a (face-down 2/2 colorless via Morph), CR 708.2a (face-down characteristics), and CR 702.37e (turning face up as a special action).
metadata.generation_notes: Lumbering Laundry: card_id lumbering-laundry, {5}, 4/5 Artifact Creature Golem, Disguise {5}. Disguise (CR 702.162) grants the Morph ability (CR 702.37) with the face-down creature also having ward {2}. Cast face-down for {3} (standard Morph generic cost). After resolution a face-down 2/2 colorless creature with no name/text is on p1's battlefield; it has ward {2} from Disguise while face-down. Turn face up by paying Disguise cost {5} (all colorless) as a special action (CR 116.2b / 702.37e) — method: disguise_cost. After turning face up, the card reveals its true name/stats (4/5 Artifact Creature Golem). mana_paid for cast_spell_morph: {colorless: 3}. mana_paid for turn_face_up (disguise_cost): {colorless: 5}. Total mana needed: 8 colorless in pool.

script.step_note: p1 casts Lumbering Laundry face-down via Disguise for {3}, then turns it face up

actions.description: Initial: Lumbering Laundry in p1 hand, battlefield empty

actions.note: CR 702.162: Disguise grants Morph (CR 702.37a). p1 casts Lumbering Laundry face-down as a 2/2 creature for {3}. While face-down it also has ward {2} (from Disguise).

actions.description: After morph cast: hand empty, spell on stack
actions.note: Card moved from hand to stack as a face-down Disguise spell.
CR 116.3: Both players pass priority — face-down spell resolves.
CR 608.2: Disguise spell resolves. Face-down 2/2 colorless creature with ward {2} enters the battlefield under p1's control (CR 708.2a, CR 702.162).

actions.description: After resolution: stack empty, hand empty (face-down 2/2 with ward {2} is on battlefield but has no name)
actions.note: Face-down permanent has no name (CR 708.2a), so cannot be asserted by name. Stack is empty.

CR 702.162 / CR 702.37e: Turning face up is a special action (CR 116.2b); does not use the stack. p1 pays the Disguise cost {5} (5 colorless). Lumbering Laundry is revealed as a 4/5 Artifact Creature — Golem.

actions.description: After turning face up: Lumbering Laundry visible on battlefield by name
actions.note: CR 708.8: Face-up permanent now has its true characteristics. Lumbering Laundry (4/5 Artifact Creature Golem) is visible by name on the battlefield.
